name: Pony Group Inc.
business: Pony Group Inc. is a travel service provider offering car services (carpooling, airport pick-up/drop-off, personal driver) for travelers between Guangdong Province and Hong Kong. It collaborates with car fleet companies and charges a service fee by matching travelers with drivers. The company also develops a mobile app called 'Lets Go App' to provide one-stop travel services.
sellsTo: travelers between Guangdong Province and Hong Kong
namedSuppliers: Shenzhen Yuegang Liantong Car Service., Ltd
